name: chief-engineer-review
summary: AI-native architectural review system for any repo that adopts Dark Factory — autonomous (post to PR) + conversational (CE second-brain) modes.

REPO_NAME.description: Display name of the consumer repo (e.g. 'Dark Factory Platform').

REPO_SLUG.description: Slug of the consumer repo (used in Make-target prefixes like `make {REPO_SLUG}-quality-gates`).
REPO_SLUG.source: darkfactory.yaml: repo.slug, or git remote inference

MANIFESTO_PATH.description: Repo-relative path to the engineering manifesto (principles doc).

ADR_DIR.description: Repo-relative path to the ADR directory.

CYCLE_DOCS_DIR.description: Repo-relative path to the cycle-docs directory.

RFC_DIR.description: Repo-relative path to the RFC directory (optional — section omitted if neither RFC_DIR nor PRD_DIR exists in consumer config).

PRD_DIR.description: Repo-relative path to the PRD directory.

CE_AGENT_PATH.description: Repo-relative path to the chief-engineer subagent definition.

QUALITY_GATE_TARGETS.description: Newline-separated, indented Make-target commands the skill should run as the validation pipeline. Rendered as a `make X` block.

API_TYPES_TARGET.description: Optional Make target for generating API types (used by review examples). Omitted if blank.
